guideline: Page route transitions should feel snappy not slow; slide or fade content in from the direction of navigation
Modal and dialog entry should emerge from trigger element using scale+opacity for spatial continuity
Drawer/sheet slide-in from edge should match the edge it enters from (right drawer slides from right)
Button press feedback (active state) must be immediate and tactile; scale-down 96% on active
column9: background color darken only; no scale

guideline: Form field focus ring should animate in to draw attention; use outline-offset expansion
Success checkmark animation after form submit provides emotional reward and confirms action completed
column9: static checkmark icon; no draw animation

guideline: Error shake animation on wrong input (login fail) gives physical metaphor for rejection; 3 oscillations max
Skeleton screens should pulse with subtle opacity cycle 0.6 to 1.0; not a spinner for content loading
Spinner rotation for async actions should be 360deg continuous loop; use CSS custom property for speed
Progress bar fill should animate smoothly as progress updates; avoid jumpy discrete steps
reduced_motion_fallback: show numeric percentage; no bar fill animation

guideline: Toggle switch should animate thumb slide + background color in sync; do not animate independently
Accordion expand/collapse should animate height via max-height or grid-template-rows trick
Tooltip appear should be delayed 500ms (prevent flash on cursor travel) and fade in
reduced_motion_fallback: static tooltip; no fade; remove delay

guideline: Chip/tag remove animation should scale-out the chip before DOM removal to avoid layout jump
Tab switching should slide content horizontally matching direction of tab (right tab = slide from right)
Floating Action Button should scale up on entry with slight overshoot spring; scale-down on hide
Scroll-triggered sticky header should transition smoothly from transparent to opaque with shadow
Color theme switch (light/dark) should crossfade all surfaces to avoid jarring flash
